location: Starting equipment for the Prisoner class. Also sold by a Nomadic Merchant found on a path beneath Bellum Church, in northern Liurnia of the Lakes, for 1,800 Runes.
tactics: The merchant sits underneath the church structure itself, not inside it — from the Bellum Church grace, look for the path leading down and under the building.
It grants +40 Focus, a passive most other small shields lack, giving mild resistance to Madness and Sleep buildup while equipped.
lore: A small metal roundshield stamped with an unsettling rift design — an old charm said to unnerve enemies by glaring back at them, and it sharpens the wielder's own focus.

builds.name: Prisoner-style Int/Str hybrid off-hand
builds.why: Cheap Strength requirement plus a Madness/Sleep-resisting Focus passive makes it a reasonable generic block option for casters who don't want to dedicate a shield slot to negation stats alone.
